prompt: Create a workflow with a POST endpoint at /batch-import that receives an array of product items. Loop through each item and for each one: validate the data format, check for duplicates, transform prices to the correct currency, and categorize the product. Items that fail validation go to an error collection. Valid items are inserted into the database. After all items are processed, generate a summary report with counts of successful imports, duplicates found, and validation errors.

checklist.item: Loops over each item in the received product array
Branches based on validation result for each item (valid vs. invalid)
Has a duplicate check step for each product item
Failed validation items are routed to an error collection path
Valid items are inserted into the database
After all items are processed, a summary report is generated
Validates the data format of each product item
Transforms product prices to the correct currency for each item
Categorizes each product item during processing
Summary report includes count of successful imports
Summary report includes count of duplicates found
Summary report includes count of validation errors
